description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI linux that runs on every push. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release build types. The job should remove unnecessary directories, check out the repository, fetch more history, install required packages, clone depot tools, fetch WebRTC, build with CMake and make, create a package with CPack, and upload the resulting artifact. If the push is a tag, also create a GitHub release with the artifact.
